sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement system documented for this RPG

special_mechanics.name: Movement Modes
special_mechanics.description: Three modes of travel available: on foot, horseback, and boat. On foot is slow; horseback is faster and consumes less food, making escape from encounters easier. Boat required for reaching island of Ambrosia and final boss.

special_mechanics.name: Party Movement
special_mechanics.description: During regular overworld play, party of four characters is represented as single player icon and moves as one unit

tier_notes: Tier 2: Qualitative data only. This is an RPG with turn-based combat and grid-based movement, not a platformer. No platforming physics (jump, gravity, acceleration) are documented or applicable to core gameplay. Movement speeds exist but are not quantified in available sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Ultima: Exodus (NES)
